narrative:
Jefferson County has 42,781 registered voters, with 59.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.5%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.2 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 31.2% of registrants.
